overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a Na'vi character traversing a bioluminescent alien jungle, ascending to a cliff edge, encountering another character with an ikran, and overlooking floating mountains under a large moon.

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense alien jungle vegetation surrounded by towering trees and glowing plants

entered.detail: thick overhead vegetation blocking most sky
glowing blue and white plants lining the path
alien trees with gnarled bark textures
moss-covered boulders along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The Na'vi character walks through a densely vegetated jungle path surrounded by towering alien trees and bioluminescent undergrowth, with limited sky visibility.

events.description: emerges from dense jungle canopy onto open mountainside path with floating mountains visible in distance

agents.ego_description: climbing the grassy mountainside path with floating islands becoming visible ahead

entered.detail: vertical stone face covered in green moss
massive rock islands suspended in the sky
glowing white ferns along the path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grassy mountainside trail bordered by a mossy rock wall, transitioning from enclosed jungle to open terrain with floating mountains appearing in the distance.

events.description: approaches an ikran and another Na'vi character at the cliff edge
dialogue text appears on screen indicating interaction with the scene

agents.ego_description: approaching a resting ikran and another Na'vi character near the cliff edge, then walking past them toward the overlook

notable_agents.action: another Na'vi character standing near the ikran
large blue ikran creature resting on the grass with bioluminescent patterns

entered.detail: large winged creature with blue bioluminescent markings
Na'vi figure standing beside the ikran

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide cliff edge where another Na'vi tends to a resting ikran, with massive floating mountains dominating the background. Dialogue appears as the character passes by.

events.description: character stops walking to stand at cliff edge and observe the expansive vista

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge gazing at floating mountains and the large moon in the night sky

entered.detail: massive pale moon rising behind the mountains
water cascading from floating rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the cliff edge overlooking a breathtaking vista of floating mountains, waterfalls, and a massive moon in the blue night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a bioluminescent jungle to a sweeping vista atop a high cliff. It begins by following a Na'vi character through a densely vegetated path of towering alien trees and glowing undergrowth where the sky is nearly hidden. As the character ascends a grassy mountainside trail bordered by mossy rock walls, the enclosed canopy gives way to open terrain and the first glimpses of floating mountains in the distance. The scene then opens onto a wide cliff edge where the character passes another Na'vi tending to a resting ikran, with the massive floating landmasses now dominating the horizon. Finally, the camera settles at the precipice to overlook a breathtaking expanse of waterfalls and floating mountains beneath a massive moon in the blue night sky.
